item.title: Miley Cyrus Gives Hannah Montana Vibes in Malibu, Plus Brad Pitt, Lizzo, Kate Moss and More
item.description: From L.A. to London, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Megan Thee Stallion Says She’s ‘Manifesting’ Her Engagement amid Klay Thompson Romance: 'I Love Love'
item.description: The star made the admission during a video with Team USA stars Brittany Bowe and Hilary Knight who have recently announced their engagement

item.title: Sheriff In Nancy Guthrie Kidnapping Case Says There Is 'No Evidence' Suspect Came to Her Home on a Day Prior to Abduction
item.description: Nancy Guthrie, the mother of 'Today' co-anchor Savannah Guthrie, was last seen on Jan. 31

item.title: Ashley Tisdale Admits She Needs to Take ‘Regular Breaks’ from Social Media amid 'Toxic' Mom Group Drama
item.description: Tisdale's latest blog post comes amid the fallout of her viral essay for 'The Cut'

item.title: Taylor Swift Goes Makeup-Free in New ‘Opalite’ Behind-the-Scenes Video
item.description: ‘The Life of a Showgirl’ singer-songwriter went makeup-free in the studio while creating the pop hit in a new Instagram post
